description: A warehouse packer is ready to ship an order and needs to generate a shipping label.

nodes.task_description: Scan the order's packing slip to identify the order.

expected_outcome.value: System retrieves the correct order details, including the customer's shipping address.

nodes.task_description: Weigh the package and input its dimensions and weight.

expected_outcome.value: System captures the package's physical characteristics.

nodes.task_description: Purchase and generate a shipping label from the appropriate carrier based on the selected shipping method.

expected_outcome.value: System successfully generates a printable shipping label.
